storyHook: 打包箱子，搬运装车，搬进新家
storyBlurb: 周六一早，甲和乙在旧家打包行李，准备搬进新租的房子。从装箱到装车，再到新家卸货摆好，一天内必须完成。
storyScript:
【开场·开始打包】周六清晨，阳光透过旧家窗帘的缝隙洒在地板上。甲站在客厅中央，四周堆满了纸箱和杂物。他拿起一卷胶带，撕下一段，熟练地封住一个装满书籍的箱子。乙从厨房走出来，手里抱着几个易碎的相框，小心翼翼地用报纸裹好，放进另一个标有「易碎品」的箱子里。两人动作迅速，但有条不紊。甲看了一眼墙上的钟，已经八点了，他们必须在日落前把所有东西搬完。

【进行·搬运装车】打包完成后，真正的体力活开始了。甲和乙合力抬起那个沉重的实木书桌，一前一后，喊着口号，一步步挪向门口。汗水顺着他们的脸颊滑落，滴在地板上。下楼时，乙提醒甲注意转角，甲咬紧牙关，调整角度，终于把书桌塞进搬家车的车厢里。接下来是沙发、床垫——每件重物都考验着他们的体力与耐心。

【进行·搬进新家】下午三点，搬家车停在了一栋老式公寓楼下。甲掏出新钥匙，打开单元门，乙扛起一个箱子跟在他身后。新家空荡荡的，阳光从窗户照进来，映在木地板上。甲指挥着乙：这个放卧室，那个放客厅。两人来回穿梭，把一件件行李搬上三楼。

【收束·卸货摆好】傍晚时分，所有行李都堆在了新家的各个房间里。甲打开一个箱子，取出台灯放在床头柜上，又拿出几本书塞进书架。乙在厨房拆开餐具箱，把碗碟一个个放进橱柜。甲环顾四周，虽然还是一片狼藉，但家的轮廓已经显现。两人相视一笑。新家的灯光亮起，窗外暮色渐浓，一切终于安顿下来。

narrative.when: 周六一早，新家钥匙昨天刚拿到
narrative.where: 旧家到新家之间，搬家车上下
narrative.who: 甲（搬家的人）· 乙（帮忙的朋友）
narrative.how: 把东西一件件打包装箱再搬上车
narrative.method: 打包贵重物品、抬重家具上车、卸货进新家、按房间摆好
narrative.event: 甲新租的房子下周一就要入住，东西必须今天搬完

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let's get these boxes sorted.
turns.zh: 好了，咱们把这些箱子理一理。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put paper round the glass things.
turns.zh: 我用报纸把玻璃东西裹起来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I'll do the books.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That box is full now. Put a cover on it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us put a mark on it?
turns.zh: 要不要在上面做个记号？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, put 'kitchen' on the side.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: These cups go in a small box.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have a small one here. Use this.
turns.zh: 我这儿有个小的。用这个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We have six boxes now. Not bad.
turns.zh: 现在有六个箱子了。不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep going. The sun is up.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Almost done with the boxes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let's start on the great things.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This table is not light. We need a way.
turns.zh: 这张桌子不轻。得想个办法。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Lift from under. I will take the back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ready? One, two, three... up!

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good, it is moving. Now go down the steps bit by bit.
turns.zh: 好，动了。现在一级一级往下走。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Watch your step. The turn is tight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let's put it in the back of the car.
turns.zh: 好的。把它放车厢后面吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will push it. You keep it straight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There. One great thing done. What is after this?
turns.zh: 好了。一个大件搞定。这之后是什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That seat is a weight, but we can do it.
turns.zh: 那个座位很重，但咱们能行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Lift from the ends. On three.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One, two, three... up! Walk forward.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Keep still. Almost at the car. A bit more.
turns.zh: 稳住。快到车了。再来一点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: In it goes. That was hard work. Well done.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Now for the boxes with glass things. be safe.
turns.zh: 好了。现在搬那些有玻璃东西的箱子。小心点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the top one. You get the side.
turns.zh: 我拿上面那个。你抬侧面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. Walk slow. The steps are narrow.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Watch your head on the door frame.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thanks. Put it here. I will get another.
turns.zh: 谢谢。放这儿吧。我去拿另一个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How many more boxes are there?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Only six. Then the bed parts.
turns.zh: 就六个了。然后是床的零件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I am getting tired but we are near the end.
turns.zh: 好。我有点累了，但快结束了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Same here. But this is the last time down.
turns.zh: 我也是。但这是最后一次下楼了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. Let's get the last of them and go.
turns.zh: 太好了。咱们把最后几个搬了就走。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will take the one with the books.
turns.zh: 好。我来搬那个装书的箱子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put the bed frame across the top?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that will keep the boxes safe under it.
turns.zh: 行，这样箱子在下面稳当。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Watch the edge. It is a tight turn.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. One more push and we are done.
turns.zh: 收到。再推一把就搞定了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let's get this one in.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Push it to the left a bit.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There. It goes in. Good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now the small boxes on top.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will hand them up to you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here, take this one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is all right. Give me another.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the last box.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. Shut the door.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let's go. New place here we come.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will drive. You sit and rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Are you sure you know the way?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I went yesterday to drop off the key. I know every turn.
turns.zh: 昨天去拿了钥匙，每个转弯都记得。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I forgot you did that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About forty minutes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The boxes will not move in the back?
turns.zh: 箱子在后面不会滑动吧？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put a line round them. All tight.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I do not want to hear breaking sounds from behind us.
turns.zh: 好，我不想听到后面传来碎裂声。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Nothing in those boxes can break. The glass things are in the soft part.
turns.zh: 那些箱子里没有易碎的，玻璃东西都在软垫里包着。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I think I may fall asleep. My arms are dead.
turns.zh: 我可能要睡着了，手臂完全没力气了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sleep. I will wake you when we get there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here we are.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Third floor, right side.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Open it. Let us see.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: After you.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Empty. The floor is good wood.
turns.zh: 空荡荡的，地板是好木头。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It will fill up fast. Where do you want the big seat?
turns.zh: 很快就会满了，大沙发放哪里？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: By the window. I want to sit there when the sun comes in.
turns.zh: 靠窗户那边，阳光进来的时候我想坐那儿看看外面。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will bring it up first.
turns.zh: 好主意，我先把它搬上来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will hold the door.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This is... very... heavy.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Lift from your legs, not your back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Easy to say from where you are standing.
turns.zh: 站在你那个位置说起来很轻松。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you want me to take a side?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes — the door end. Here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got it. On three — one, two, three.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is through. Keep going.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Turn left — the room is to the left.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Down — gently.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There. By the window.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It looks right here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It does. What is next?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The sleeping thing. I can not sleep on the floor tonight.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The frame first, then the soft part.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The soft part — is that the one in the blue cover?
turns.zh: 床垫——是套蓝色罩子的那个吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is the one.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will carry the frame. You take the boxes from the car.
turns.zh: 好，我来抬床架，你负责把箱子从车上搬下来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Last box.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me take it.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am all right. Just... slow.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did most of the work today.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is what best friends are for.
turns.zh: 这就是最好的朋友该做的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then this best friend will make dinner. That is what I will do.
turns.zh: 那么这个最好的朋友来做晚饭，这是我要做的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. But first — where does this box go?
turns.zh: 成交，不过先说——这个箱子放哪儿？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the kitchen one. In there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. I am sitting down now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sit on the seat by the window. You have earned it.
turns.zh: 坐窗边的沙发，你赚到了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is a very good seat.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have had it for four years.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It does not look four years old.
turns.zh: 看起来不像用了四年的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I be safe of my things.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This place looks like a home already.
turns.zh: 这地方看起来已经像个家了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Just from one seat?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And the light. It is warm in here.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I picked this room because of the window.
turns.zh: 我选这个房间就是因为那扇窗户。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good pick.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. For everything today.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, that is what best friends are for.
turns.zh: 这就是最好朋友的用处。
